title: Set C1 output standards
subtitle: Define what quality means.
overview: Module: C1 Bridge Integration. C1 Bridge develops conceptual thinking, source synthesis, discourse control, long-form speaking, analytical writing, and independent C1 learning habits.

sections.title: C1 bridge focus
rows: Advanced learning needs standards that are clear enough to apply.
高级学习需要足够清楚、可应用的标准。
C1 Bridge frame: integrate analysis, voice, evidence, and output into an independent learning cycle.
C1 Bridge 框架：把分析、声音、证据和输出整合进独立学习循环。
设定你的 C1 输出标准。
For speaking, quality means coherence, nuance, listener awareness, and natural rhythm. For writing, it means logic, precision, tone, and revision.
对口语来说，质量意味着连贯、细腻度、听者意识和自然节奏。对写作来说，它意味着逻辑、准确、语气和修改。

items.en: Advanced learning needs standards that are clear enough to apply.
items.zh: 高级学习需要足够清楚、可应用的标准。

items.en: C1 Bridge frame: integrate analysis, voice, evidence, and output into an independent learning cycle.
items.zh: C1 Bridge 框架：把分析、声音、证据和输出整合进独立学习循环。

items.en: For speaking, quality means coherence, nuance, listener awareness, and natural rhythm. For writing, it means logic, precision, tone, and revision.
items.zh: 对口语来说，质量意味着连贯、细腻度、听者意识和自然节奏。对写作来说，它意味着逻辑、准确、语气和修改。

items.en: I will not hide behind advanced vocabulary; I will make the thinking clear.
items.zh: 我不会躲在高级词汇后面；我会把思考说清楚。

items.en: A C1 Bridge answer should show independence, coherence, nuance, and control.
items.zh: C1 Bridge 回答应该显示独立性、连贯性、细腻度和控制力。

items.en: If the idea is abstract, I will anchor it in one concrete case.
items.zh: 如果想法很抽象，我会把它锚定在一个具体案例中。

items.en: I can revise not only grammar, but also logic, density, tone, and voice.
items.zh: 我可以修改的不只是语法，也包括逻辑、密度、语气和声音。

items.en: This lesson becomes real when I can use the move in a new topic without copying the model.
items.zh: 当我能在新话题中使用这个动作，而不是复制示范时，这节课才变得真实。

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 设定你的 C1 输出标准。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: For speaking, quality means coherence, nuance, listener awareness, and natural rhythm. For writing, it means logic, precision, tone, and revision.
lines.zh: 对口语来说，质量意味着连贯、细腻度、听者意识和自然节奏。对写作来说，它意味着逻辑、准确、语气和修改。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you make the response more conceptual and still easy to follow?
lines.zh: 你能让回应更概念化，同时仍然容易跟上吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes. I will define the idea, give one concrete case, and explain why it matters.
lines.zh: 可以。我会定义这个想法，给一个具体案例，并解释它为什么重要。

items.zh: 设定你的 C1 输出标准。

items.en: Answer once in eight to ten sentences with a clear line of thought.
items.zh: 用八到十句话回答一次，并保持清楚思路。

items.en: Add one C1 Bridge move: define a concept, synthesize sources, name an assumption, or state an unresolved question.
items.zh: 加入一个 C1 Bridge 动作：定义概念、综合来源、指出假设，或提出未解决问题。

items.en: Record the answer, then revise one part for logic and one part for style.
items.zh: 录下回答，然后修改一处逻辑和一处风格。

items.en: Keep the revised answer as a model for future C1 Core practice.
items.zh: 把修改后的回答作为未来 C1 Core 练习的模型。
